comment: Main Paper: 6 pages, 5 figures, 1 table. Supporting Information: 4 pages, 5 figures
summary: V-doped [Ca$_{2}$Nb$_{3-x}$V$_{x}$O$_{10}$]$^{-}$ (x = 0, 0.15, 0.3, 0.6, 0.75) nanosheets were produced by solid state reaction followed by protonation and exfoliation by tetrabutylammonium ions. 2D nanosheets have improved photocatalytic activity due to their small thickness that reduces electron-hole recombination, larger surface area that increases photocatalytic sites, and decreased band gap from added V. V-doping has caused the wide band gap of 3.54 eV of undoped nanosheets to decrease to 2.60-2.88 eV range. 10 vol% methanol was used as a hole scavenger in the hydrogen evolution reactions, and 3 wt% Pt was deposited on nanosheets as a co-catalyst. Under a full-spectrum Xe light, [Ca$_{2}$Nb$_{2.7}$V$_{0.3}$O$_{10}$]$^{-}$ has produced 4.7 times the H$_{2}$ yield as undoped nanosheets with a 11.3 mmol/g/h production rate, [Ca$_{2}$Nb$_{2.7}$V$_{0.3}$O$_{10}$]$^{-}$ with Pt co-catalyst has produced 2.9 times the H$_{2}$ yield as undoped Pt-loaded nanosheets.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过固相反应、质子化和剥离制备了V掺杂钙铌酸盐纳米片，V掺杂将带隙从3.54 eV降至2.60-2.88 eV，最优掺杂量的纳米片在Pt助催化剂下产氢速率达11.3 mmol/g/h，是未掺杂样品的2.9-4.7倍。
AI.motivation: 通过V掺杂调控钙铌酸盐纳米片的电子结构和带隙，解决传统光催化剂电子-空穴复合率高、可见光利用率低的问题，提升光催化析氢性能。
AI.method: 采用固相反应合成V掺杂Ca₂Nb₃₋ₓVₓO₁₀前驱体，经质子化处理后，用四丁基铵离子进行剥离得到二维纳米片；以甲醇为空穴牺牲剂，Pt为助催化剂，在全光谱氙灯下测试光催化析氢活性。
AI.result: V掺杂使纳米片带隙从3.54 eV降至2.60-2.88 eV；[Ca₂Nb₂.₇V₀.₃O₁₀]⁻产氢速率达11.3 mmol/g/h，是未掺杂样品的4.7倍；负载Pt后产氢量是未掺杂Pt负载样品的2.9倍。
AI.conclusion: V掺杂是提升钙铌酸盐纳米片光催化析氢性能的有效策略，通过减小带隙、增大比表面积、降低电子-空穴复合率，显著增强了光催化活性。

title: Non-Bloch band theory of boundary-controlled magnon edge modes in an antiferromagnetic chain
summary: We define a winding number within the Non-Bloch band theory framework that captures the emergence of magnon edge modes in a one-dimensional antiferromagnetic spin chain, even when the conventional Bloch winding number is trivial. Within linear spin-wave theory, magnon excitations are governed by a non-Hermitian dynamic matrix, despite the underlying Hamiltonian being Hermitian. The symmetry classification of this matrix yields a trivial bulk invariant, however, finite systems exhibit boundary-localized modes, signaling a breakdown of the conventional bulk-boundary correspondence. We further show that these edge modes can be controlled via boundary perturbations. By tuning the boundary potential, the modes can be driven into or out of the bulk spectrum. To resolve the bulk-boundary mismatch, we develop a non-Bloch framework based on a generalized Brillouin zone and a winding number that correctly predicts the presence of edge states. Our results establish boundary-controlled topological transitions that are experimentally accessible through local Zeeman fields or modified edge anisotropy in antiferromagnetic van der Waals nanostructures.

AI.tldr: 本文在非布洛赫能带理论框架下定义了绕数，成功预测了一维反铁磁自旋链中原本被传统布洛赫绕数视为平庸的磁子边缘态，并通过边界微扰实现了边缘态的可控拓扑转变。
AI.motivation: 传统布洛赫能带理论无法解释反铁磁自旋链中出现的磁子边界局域模，存在体-边对应关系失效的问题。
AI.method: 在线性自旋波理论框架下，利用非厄米动力学矩阵的对称性分类，发展基于广义布里渊区的非布洛赫理论，定义新的绕数来正确预测边缘态。
AI.result: 非布洛赫绕数成功预测了边缘态的存在；通过边界势调控可将边缘态驱动进出体态能谱；边界微扰（局域塞曼场或修正边缘各向异性）可实现拓扑转变。
AI.conclusion: 建立了边界可控的拓扑转变机制，在反铁磁范德华纳米结构中可通过实验实现，解决了传统体-边对应关系失效的难题。

title: Divergent Coherent Phonon Responses Across the Metal-Insulator Crossover
summary: Ultrafast laser control of material properties hinges on understanding light-matter interactions. We use two experimentally accessible response functions, laser fluence induced phonon softening and the amplitude of coherent reflectance oscillations, to compare how strongly different materials respond to ultrafast photoexcitation. Comparing a diverse set of materials, we find that only a narrow class, including Sb, GeTe, and Bi2Te3, shows exceptional responses such as pronounced phonon softening and a giant increase of reflectance oscillations with increasing fluence. These response functions peak in an intermediate conductivity regime of about 102 - 104 S/cm, at the crossover between localized and delocalized electronic states. The corresponding class of solids also shows other unconventional properties including high dielectric constants, enhanced Born effective charges, coordination numbers exceeding the 8-N rule and uncommon bond rupture. This suggests that these materials employ a unique bonding mechanism, coined metavalent bonding. Frozen-phonon DFT calculations show that the strong fluence dependence arises from Peierls-like instabilities, leading to large deformation potentials and anharmonic double-well potentials. These findings identify metavalent bonding as a design principle for enhanced coherent phonon control and provide a quantitative framework for identifying materials with exceptional ultrafast responses.

AI.tldr: 本文通过激光注量诱导的声子软化和相干反射振荡振幅这两个响应函数，发现只有少数材料（如Sb、GeTe、Bi2Te3）在超快光激发下表现出异常响应，这些材料处于中间电导率区间（10²-10⁴ S/cm），其独特行为源于"金属-共价混合键"（metavalent bonding）机制，为超快相干声子控制提供了设计原则。
AI.motivation: 理解超快激光控制材料性质的关键在于光-物质相互作用机制，但哪些材料在超快光激发下表现出异常响应以及背后的物理机制尚不清楚。
AI.method: 利用激光注量诱导的声子软化和相干反射振荡振幅两个实验可测响应函数，对多种材料进行对比分析，并结合冻结声子DFT计算研究其物理机制。
AI.result: 仅Sb、GeTe、Bi2Te3等少数材料在超快光激发下表现出显著的声子软化和反射振荡巨幅增强，这些材料处于10²-10⁴ S/cm的中间电导率区间，位于局域与离域电子态的交叉点。
AI.conclusion: 这些材料的异常响应源于金属-共价混合键（metavalent bonding）机制，该键合机制具有高介电常数、增强的Born有效电荷、超过8-N规则的配位数等特性，可作为增强相干声子控制的设计原则。

title: Local electronic structure and dynamics of hydrogen in $\text{CeO}_2$
summary: The local electronic states of muon (Mu) as an isotope of hydrogen (H) in high-quality single-crystalline ceria (CeO$_2$) are investigated using muon spin rotation/relaxation ($μ\text{SR}$) and first-principles density functional theory (DFT) calculations. Upon positive muon implantation, both paramagnetic (Mu$^0$) and diamagnetic (Mu$^*$) states are observed below $\approx$10 K. Magnetic field dependence of the Mu$^0$ signals combined with DFT results provides evidence for the formation of a polaron state, consisting of Mu bonded to a ligand oxygen and a $4f$ electron localized on a nearby Ce site. The crystal-orientation dependence of the Mu$^0$ signal suggests strong anisotropy of the $4f$ electron due to the spin-orbit coupling with lifted degeneracy. Furthermore, the Mu$^0$ state exhibits transition to the Mu$^*$ state that corresponds to another Mu$^0$ state (exhibiting a diamagnetic response due to fast spin/charge fluctuations) at temperatures above $\approx$10 K, before disappearing above $\approx$30 K. These findings suggest rapid diffusive motion of the $4f$ electrons and/or Mu (as well as H) at higher temperatures.

AI.tldr: 本文通过μSR实验和DFT计算，研究了单晶CeO₂中作为氢同位素的缪子（Mu）的局域电子态，发现低温下存在极化子态（Mu⁰）和抗磁态（Mu*），并揭示了4f电子的各向异性与温度诱导的态间转变。
AI.motivation: 利用Mu作为H的轻同位素探针，研究CeO₂中氢的局域电子结构和极化子行为，理解4f电子的局域化与动力学。
AI.method: μSR实验结合第一性原理DFT计算，分析磁场和晶体取向对缪子信号的影响。
AI.result: 观测到低温（<10 K）下Mu⁰（顺磁极化子态）和Mu*（抗磁态）共存；Mu⁰信号显示4f电子因自旋-轨道耦合产生的强各向异性；温度>10 K时Mu⁰→Mu*转变，>30 K时信号消失。
AI.conclusion: Mu/H在CeO₂中形成极化子，4f电子表现出各向异性与温度依赖的快速扩散运动。

title: Nonperturbative isotope effect on light-matter interaction in boron arsenide
summary: The interaction of light and matter under strong isotope disorder gives rise to unconventional physics that goes beyond the quantum perturbation theory. In boron arsenide, the large mass difference between the two stable boron isotopes presents a paradigmatic case where perturbation theory fails, yet a unified theoretical framework across the perturbative and nonperturbative regime has remained elusive. Here, we develop a nonperturbative approach to capture isotope-disorder effect in boron arsenide, which fundamentally alters light-matter interactions. We reveal that coherently mixed vibrations between two boron isotopes reshape the dielectric function in the nonperturbative regime. The nonperturbative isotope interactions dictate the properties of coupled surface phonon polaritons and near-field radiative heat transfer. Two-fold tuning of radiative heat flux is achieved by modulating the surface phonon polariton resonance via isotope engineering. This work establishes a unified framework connecting the perturbative and nonperturbative limits, enabling quantitative predictions across weak to strong disorder regime.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种非微扰方法研究硼砷化物中强同位素无序对光-物质相互作用的影响，揭示了非微扰区同位素振动混合重塑介电函数，并通过同位素工程实现了辐射热通量的两倍调控，建立了从微扰到非微扰的统一理论框架。
AI.motivation: 硼砷化物中两种稳定硼同位素质量差异巨大，导致微扰理论失效，亟需一个能够统一描述从微扰到非微扰区间的理论框架。
AI.method: 发展了一种非微扰方法，捕捉硼砷化物中同位素无序效应，考虑了两种硼同位素之间的相干混合振动。
AI.result: 发现非微扰区同位素相干混合振动重塑了介电函数；同位素无序支配表面声子极化激元和近场辐射热传递特性；通过同位素工程调节表面声子极化激元共振，实现了辐射热通量的两倍调控。
AI.conclusion: 建立了连接微扰与非微扰极限的统一框架，实现了从弱无序到强无序体系的定量预测。

title: Planar Hall effect in single and bilayer Rashba systems
summary: The planar Hall effect (PHE) is an anisotropic magnetotransport response generated by coplanar electric and magnetic fields. We investigate the PHE in single- and bilayer two-dimensional electron gases (2DEGs) with Rashba spin-orbit coupling and identify two distinct mechanisms: Zeeman coupling and a band geometric channel. In the Zeeman channel, an in-plane magnetic field distorts the Rashba spin-orbit-coupled band dispersion and generates anisotropic carrier velocities, producing a finite PHE. In an asymmetric Rashba bilayer, interlayer electronic delocalization generates finite planar Berry curvature and orbital magnetic moment components, giving rise to a band geometric PHE channel. Using semiclassical Boltzmann transport theory, we calculate the chemical potential and angular dependence of the planar Hall conductivity for both mechanisms. Symmetry analysis shows that the leading response is quadratic in the magnetic field and exhibits the characteristic $π$-periodic angular dependence. For the parameter regime considered here, the Zeeman-induced contribution dominates, while the band geometric channel provides a distinct symmetry-allowed contribution unique to asymmetric Rashba bilayers. Our results reveal microscopic origins of anisotropic magnetotransport in spin-orbit-coupled two-dimensional materials.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Rashba自旋轨道耦合的单层和双层二维电子气中的平面霍尔效应，识别出两种机制：塞曼耦合和能带几何通道。塞曼通道通过磁场扭曲能带产生各向异性速度，而双层中的不对称性产生有限平面贝里曲率。数值计算显示塞曼贡献占主导，但几何通道是双层特有的对称性允许贡献。
AI.motivation: 作者旨在揭示自旋轨道耦合二维材料中各向异性磁输运的微观起源，特别是区分平面霍尔效应中不同物理机制的贡献。
AI.method: 使用半经典玻尔兹曼输运理论，计算了平面霍尔电导率随化学势和角度的依赖关系，并结合对称性分析进行解析。
AI.result: 识别出塞曼耦合和能带几何两种PHE机制；响应在磁场中呈二次方，并具有π周期角度依赖；在参数范围内塞曼贡献占主导，几何通道是不对称Rashba双层特有的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了自旋轨道耦合二维材料中各向异性磁输运的微观机制，为理解和设计基于Rashba系统的平面霍尔效应提供了理论基础。

title: Information Entropy Based Crystal Structure Prediction of Chemically Disordered Alloys via Graph Convolutional Neural Networks
summary: The phase prediction of chemically disordered alloys poses a significant computational challenge due to the combinatorial complexity of such materials. The high-throughput compositional exploration of chemically disordered alloys, including high-entropy alloys, requires an approach to efficiently explore the potential energy landscape of such complex materials. Additionally, a metric to quantify the potential energy landscape explored for phase prediction of the compositions needs to be defined. We propose an information-theoretic approach to phase prediction in chemically disordered alloys in the present work. We demonstrate the applicability of alchemical Monte Carlo sampling using an efficient Graph Convolutional Neural Network-Based machine learning model. We additionally demonstrate the applicability and limitations of the Bond Disproportion Vector (BDV) as a low-computational-cost descriptor and benchmark it against the state-of-the-art Smooth Overlap of Atomic Positions (SOAP) descriptor. We show the applicability of an information entropy-based metric for the phase prediction of binary (CoNi, MoW, FeNi and TaW), ternary (CoCrNi, CrFeNi), quaternary (CoCrFeNi) and quinary ($\mathrm{Al_x(CoCrFeNi)_{1-x}}$) alloys. Information entropy-based phase prediction can be applicable in challenging cases where conventional approaches are not feasible.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息论的方法，结合图卷积神经网络和蒙特卡洛采样，用于化学无序合金的相预测，并引入信息熵作为量化指标，在二元到五元合金系统中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 化学无序合金（包括高熵合金）的相预测面临组合爆炸带来的计算挑战，传统方法在高通量成分探索中效率低下，亟需一种高效探索势能面并定义量化指标的新方法。
AI.method: 采用信息论方法，结合炼金术蒙特卡洛采样与基于图卷积神经网络的机器学习模型；提出键偏离向量（BDV）作为低计算成本描述符，并与SOAP描述符进行对比；引入信息熵作为相预测的度量指标。
AI.result: 在二元（CoNi, MoW, FeNi, TaW）、三元（CoCrNi, CrFeNi）、四元（CoCrFeNi）和五元（Al_x(CoCrFeNi)_{1-x}）合金中验证了信息熵方法的有效性，展示了BDV描述符的适用性与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 基于信息熵的相预测方法在传统方法不可行的挑战性案例中仍然适用，为化学无序合金的高通量成分探索提供了新的有效途径。

title: Crystallography of periodic nanotextures in a strained Mott insulator
summary: Here we investigate stripes of alternating structural phases spontaneously forming in epitaxially strained $Ca_2RuO_4$ thin films below the metal-insulator transition. Using large-volume X-ray reciprocal-space mapping, we show that satellite-pattern intensities across 24 symmetry-inequivalent Bragg reflections collapse onto a single parameter-free curve. The collapse identifies a coherent martensitic laminate of few-nm-wide domains separated by ${012}$ interfaces, with displacements along $\left\langle01\bar{2}\right\rangle$. Satellite-extinction analysis demonstrates that both coexisting phases retain the bulk orthorhombic space group despite the pseudocubic $LaAlO_3$ substrate, biaxial epitaxial strain, and intrinsic strain at the interfaces. Classical invariant-plane-strain crystallography thus governs the nanoscale domain geometry of a Mott insulator with intertwined magnetic, electronic, and lattice order.

AI.tldr: 本文利用X射线倒易空间映射技术，揭示了在Ca₂RuO₄薄膜中自发形成的交替结构相条纹——一种马氏体层状结构，遵循经典的不变平面应变晶体学，尽管存在复杂的电子、磁性和晶格关联。
AI.motivation: 研究在受外延应变的Ca₂RuO₄薄膜中，金属-绝缘体相变以下自发形成的交替结构相条纹的微观起源和晶体学规律。
AI.method: 使用大体积X射线倒易空间映射技术，测量24个对称不等价布拉格反射周围的卫星图案强度，进行卫星消光分析，并验证经典的不变平面应变晶体学模型。
AI.result: 所有卫星图案强度坍缩到一条单一的无参数曲线上，识别出由{012}界面分隔、沿⟨01\bar{2}⟩方向位移的几纳米宽马氏体层状结构，且两共存相均保持正交空间群。
AI.conclusion: 在Mott绝缘体中，纳米尺度域几何受经典的不变平面应变晶体学支配，即使存在伪立方衬底、双轴外延应变和界面本征应变，晶体结构仍保持正交对称性。

title: Frequency-resolved decoherence spectroscopy of a semiconductor charge qubit coupled to a high-impedance resonator
summary: Superconducting resonators coupled to semiconductor quantum dots provide a powerful platform to investigate light-matter interaction and decoherence mechanisms in solid-state quantum systems. Here we study a hybrid circuit quantum electrodynamics architecture consisting of a GaAs double-quantum-dot charge qubit capacitively coupled to a high-impedance, frequency-tunable SQUID-array resonator. By tuning the qubit transition frequency over the range $ω_\mathrm{q}/2π\sim 3$-$6$ GHz, we perform frequency-resolved decoherence spectroscopy of the charge qubit across a broad energy window. Time-resolved measurements enable us to disentangle relaxation and pure dephasing processes and to identify distinct decoherence regimes as a function of qubit frequency. We find that at lower frequencies ($\leq 4.5$ GHz) dephasing dominates the qubit linewidth, whereas at higher frequencies energy relaxation becomes the leading contribution. The measured frequency dependence of the relaxation rate exhibits a cubic scaling, consistent with charge-qubit decay dominated by coupling to a piezoelectric phonon bath and providing frequency-resolved access to the corresponding phonon-induced spectral density. Our results show that hybrid semiconductor--superconducting circuits can serve as sensitive spectroscopic tools to probe microscopic decoherence mechanisms relevant for a wide range of hybrid quantum devices.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种GaAs双量子点电荷量子比特与高阻抗、频率可调SQUID阵列谐振器耦合的混合电路量子电动力学架构。通过调节量子比特频率在3-6 GHz范围内，进行了频率分辨的退相干谱学分析，区分了弛豫和纯退相位过程，发现低频时退相位主导、高频时能量弛豫主导，且弛豫率呈三次方频率标度，与压电声子浴耦合一致。
AI.motivation: 为了深入理解固态量子系统中光-物质相互作用和退相干机制，特别是电荷量子比特在不同频率下的退相干行为及其微观起源。
AI.method: 将GaAs双量子点电荷量子比特电容耦合到高阻抗、频率可调的SQUID阵列谐振器，通过调节量子比特跃迁频率(3-6 GHz)进行频率分辨的退相干谱学测量，并结合时间分辨测量来区分弛豫和纯退相位过程。
AI.result: 低频(≤4.5 GHz)时退相位主导量子比特线宽，高频时能量弛豫成为主要贡献；弛豫率随频率呈三次方标度，与压电声子浴耦合导致的电荷量子比特衰减一致。
AI.conclusion: 混合半导体-超导电路可以作为灵敏的光谱工具，用以探测广泛混合量子器件中微观退相干机制。

title: Chiral-Angle-Controlled Altermagnetic Spin Splitting in Nanotubes
summary: Altermagnets exhibit momentum-dependent spin splitting despite having zero net magnetization. Here, we show that rolling a two-dimensional (2D) $d$-wave altermagnet into a nanotube transforms this momentum-dependent spin splitting into chiral-angle-controlled one-dimensional (1D) spin splitting through dimensional projection. Using a minimal tight-binding model and first-principles calculations, we demonstrate that the nanotube spin splitting follows a characteristic $\cos(2θ)$ dependence, vanishing for nodal orientations and reaching extrema for antinodal orientations. The mechanism remains robust across a broad class of nanotubes derived from 2D altermagnets. Our results establish dimensional projection as a general route for transferring momentum-dependent altermagnetic spin splitting into 1D systems and provide a framework for engineering spin-split quantum states in low-dimensional magnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了将二维d波交变磁体卷曲成纳米管后，通过维度投影将动量依赖的自旋劈裂转化为手性角控制的一维自旋劈裂，且遵循cos(2θ)依赖关系。
AI.motivation: 探索如何将交变磁体中动量依赖的自旋劈裂转化为可被几何参数（如手性角）调控的一维自旋劈裂，拓展低维磁性材料的量子态工程。
AI.method: 使用最小紧束缚模型和第一性原理计算，构建二维d波交变磁体纳米管模型，分析手性角对自旋劈裂的影响。
AI.result: 纳米管自旋劈裂呈现cos(2θ)依赖关系，在节点取向消失，在反节点取向达到极值，该机制对多种2D交变磁体纳米管均普适。
AI.conclusion: 维度投影是将动量依赖的交变磁自旋劈裂传递到一维系统的通用途径，为低维磁性材料中自旋劈裂量子态的工程设计提供了框架。

title: Persistent currents, whirlpools, and local Chern markers in twisted TMD Chern insulators
summary: Recent materials advances have made it possible to fabricate twisted transition metal dichalcogenide homobilayers. These systems have been shown to host integer and fractional Chern insulating states. Because of spontaneous time reversal symmetry breaking, their ground state harbors intriguing spin-polarized currents with whirlpools on the moiré length scale that can be measured by scanning probe methods. We first provide a quantitative analysis of these persistent currents and then show that the maximum of the amplitude of the current density in the bulk of the sample is an accurate tracker of topological order. We conclude by calculating how the quantization of the Hall conductance is affected by finite-size effects.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了扭曲过渡金属硫族化合物同质双层中的拓扑有序性，通过分析持续电流和霍尔电导的量子化，提出电流密度幅值可作为拓扑有序的精确标志。
AI.motivation: 扭曲TMD同质双层中发现了整数和分数量子反常霍尔效应，但如何通过实验手段准确追踪其拓扑有序性仍是一个关键问题。
AI.method: 首先定量分析系统中的持续电流（自旋极化涡旋电流），然后证明体相电流密度幅值的最大值可作为拓扑有序的精确追踪器，最后计算有限尺寸效应对霍尔电导量子化的影响。
AI.result: 发现体相电流密度幅值的最大值能够准确反映拓扑有序性；有限尺寸效应会影响霍尔电导的量子化程度。
AI.conclusion: 体相电流密度幅值可作为探测拓扑有序的有效实验标志，为研究扭曲TMD中的拓扑相提供了新方法。

title: Radiowave-induced Resistance Oscillations
summary: Microwave-induced resistance oscillations (MIROs) \cite{zudov:2001a} occur when a 2D electron gas is subjected to radiation of frequency $ω= 2 πf$ and varying magnetic field $B$. MIROs are periodic in $1/B$, with the period determined by the radiation frequency $ω$, and their amplitude scales with the radiation power. Stepping from single-photon transitions between Landau levels, MIROs are found on the lower-field side of the cyclotron resonance, $ω_c \lesssim ω$, where $ω_c$ is the cyclotron frequency. Here, we report on experimental observation of another class of magneto resistance oscillations, which are also induced by radiation, but in the radio frequency (UHF band) range. These oscillations are distinct from MIROs in the following aspects: (i) they occur at $ω_c \gg ω$, (ii) their amplitude is independent of radiation power, (iii) their period is controlled by the radiation electric field, rather than by $ω$, and (iv) they can be either $1/B$ or $1/B^2$-periodic, depending on $B$. We further show that these oscillations can be explained by a displacement model in the limit of short-range disorder.

AI.tldr: 本文报告了一类新的辐射诱导磁阻振荡现象，与已知的MIRO不同，它在高频波段、高回旋频率条件下产生，振幅与辐射功率无关，周期由辐射电场控制，并且可呈现1/B或1/B^2周期性，作者用短程无序下的位移模型进行了解释。
AI.motivation: 探索在MIRO已知现象之外是否存在新的辐射诱导磁阻振荡类型，并揭示其物理机制。
AI.method: 在2D电子气中进行射频波段（UHF）辐射实验，测量不同磁场条件下的磁阻振荡，并与MIRO进行对比分析，最后用位移模型进行理论解释。
AI.result: 发现了一类新振荡：发生在ω_c ≫ ω条件下，振幅与辐射功率无关，周期由辐射电场（而非频率）决定，且可呈现1/B或1/B^2周期性。
AI.conclusion: 这类新振荡可用短程无序下的位移模型解释，与传统的MIRO在物理机制上存在本质区别。

title: Chiral Surface Phonons
summary: We use symmetry arguments combined with density functional theory to demonstrate that all surfaces of crystalline materials host surface phonons that are chiral. As model system, we study slabs of highly symmetric AB rocksalt compounds, and find surface-localized phonons whose atomic displacements exhibit chiral motion. We further show that these chiral surface phonons generate sheets of in-plane magnetism at the surface. Our results reveal that chiral phonons can emerge in all crystalline materials as a result of reduced symmetry at surfaces or interfaces. These findings establish surfaces as a previously overlooked source of chiral phonons and their associated magnetic moments, which could play a role in a broad range of surface-sensitive measurements.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过对称性分析和密度泛函理论证明，所有晶体材料的表面都存在手性声子，这些手性声子会在表面产生面内磁性，揭示了表面作为手性声子及其相关磁矩的普遍来源。
AI.motivation: 过去手性声子的研究主要关注块体材料，而忽略了表面或界面由于对称性降低可能产生手性声子的普遍性。
AI.method: 使用对称性论证结合密度泛函理论，以高对称AB岩盐化合物为模型体系，研究表面局域声子的手性行为。
AI.result: 发现所有晶体材料的表面都存在手性表面声子，这些声子的原子位移呈现手性运动，并且在表面产生面内磁性。
AI.conclusion: 手性声子普遍存在于晶体材料表面，表面是此前被忽视的手性声子及其磁矩的重要来源，对表面敏感的测量具有广泛影响。

title: Chemical tuning of magnetic ordering and cryogenic magnetocaloric response in zircon-type Gd1-xErxVO4
summary: Chemical substitution offers an effective route to tune magnetic ordering and magnetocaloric performance in rare-earth oxides for cryogenic refrigeration. Here we investigate the structural evo lution, magnetic properties, and magnetocaloric effect of polycrystalline zircon-type Gd1-xErxVO4 (x=0, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, and 0.75). Powder X-ray diffraction confirms that all samples crystallize in the tetragonal zircon structure without detectable impurity phases. Substitution of Gd3+ by the smaller Er3+ ion produces a systematic lattice contraction and modifies the magnetic behavior of the rare-earth sublattice. In particular, the magnetic ordering temperature is suppressed from 3.65(2) K in GdVO4 to 2.76(2) K in Gd0.9Er0.1VO4 , accompanied by a weakening of the spin-flop-like field-induced anomaly observed in the parent compound. A low Er concentration correspondingly improves the low-temperature magnetocaloric performance, with Gd0.9Er0.1VO4 exhibiting a max imum magnetic entropy change of 45.1 J kg-1 K-1 for mu_0 Delta H=7T. These results demonstrate that weak Er substitution effectively tunes the competition among exchange interactions, dipolar coupling, and magnetic anisotropy, optimizing the balance between magnetic ordering and available spin entropy in zircon-type rare-earth vanadates, which is crucial for developing efficient cryogenic refrigeration materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过化学替代（Er部分取代Gd）系统研究了锆石型Gd1-xErxVO4系列多晶化合物的结构演变、磁性质和磁热效应，发现低浓度Er替代可有效抑制磁有序温度、削弱自旋翻转现象，并提升低温磁热性能，其中Gd0.9Er0.1VO4在7T磁场下最大磁熵变达45.1 J kg⁻¹ K⁻¹。
AI.motivation: 通过化学替代调控稀土氧化物中的磁有序和磁热性能，为低温制冷开发更高效的锆石型稀土钒酸盐材料。
AI.method: 采用固相反应法合成Gd1-xErxVO4（x=0, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75）多晶样品，通过粉末X射线衍射确认四方锆石结构，系统测量其磁化率和磁热效应，分析晶格参数、磁有序温度、自旋翻转行为及磁熵变随Er替代量的变化。
AI.result: 所有样品均为纯相四方锆石结构；Er替代导致晶格收缩；磁有序温度从GdVO4的3.65 K降至Gd0.9Er0.1VO4的2.76 K，自旋翻转异常减弱；Gd0.9Er0.1VO4在7T下最大磁熵变达45.1 J kg⁻¹ K⁻¹，优于纯GdVO4。
AI.conclusion: 弱Er替代可有效调节交换作用、偶极耦合和磁各向异性之间的竞争，优化磁有序与自旋熵之间的平衡，是提升锆石型稀土钒酸盐低温磁热性能的有效策略。

title: Precipitate phase selection and grain boundary morphology in Cu-Ni-Si-Mn alloys: A machine-learning interatomic potential study
comment: 45 pages, 3 tables, 9 figures, 61 references, 3 SM tables, 2 SM figures
summary: Alloys inevitably contain interphase boundaries, whose energetics govern nucleation processes and precipitate morphology. In Cu-Ni-Si alloys, Mn addition markedly changes grain boundary (GB) precipitation behavior. While GB precipitation of stable Ni$_2$Si in Mn-free alloys is associated with degraded mechanical properties, Mn addition instead promotes film-shaped Mn$_6$Ni$_{16}$Si$_7$ (G-phase) precipitation, which is correlated improved mechanical properties. However, the atomic origin of the contrasting GB phase selection and morphology remains unclear. Here we perform machine-learning interatomic potential (MLIP) calculations to investigate the effect of interphase-boundary atomic structure on GB precipitates in Cu-Ni-Si alloys with and without Mn. The MLIP calculations reliably reproduce DFT-level energetics for interfacial bonding and microstructural configurations, and further predict that Mn addition favors GB precipitation of Mn$_6$Ni$_{16}$Si$_7$ rather than Ni$_2$Si. Experimentally, Mn-free alloys are observed to exhibit irregularly-shaped Ni$_2$Si precipitates with open-boundary-like Cu/Ni$_2$Si interfaces, whereas Mn-added alloys exhibit film-like G-phase at GBs. Large-scale atomistic interface calculations reveal that the coherent interface structure between Cu and Ni$_2$Si favors the formation of plate-like strained Ni$_2$Si precipitates in the matrix. Upon coarsening and stress release, an out-of-phase coherent-like interface can form at GBs, generating a local repulsive region that gives rise to surface-like open-boundary structures and explains the irregular morphology of GB stable Ni$_2$Si precipitates. In contrast, Cu/Mn$_6$Ni$_{16}$Si$_7$ interfaces remain predominantly incoherent with moderate boundary energies and no pronounced repulsive regime, thereby stabilizing continuous interfacial contact and explaining film-shaped GB precipitation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过机器学习原子间势（MLIP）计算，揭示了Cu-Ni-Si合金中Mn添加如何改变晶界析出相的选择与形貌：Mn促进G相（Mn₆Ni₁₆Si₇）形成连续薄膜状析出，而Mn-free合金中Ni₂Si因界面共格产生排斥区，形成不规则开边界形貌。
AI.motivation: Mn添加显著改变Cu-Ni-Si合金中晶界析出行为（从Ni₂Si变为G相），改善力学性能，但其原子尺度机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 采用机器学习原子间势（MLIP）计算，结合DFT精度验证，进行大规模原子尺度界面结构分析。
AI.result: MLIP计算可靠复现DFT级界面能；Mn添加偏好G相而非Ni₂Si析出；Cu/Ni₂Si界面存在共格→失配→排斥区演变，导致不规则形貌；Cu/G相界面始终非共格且能量适中，维持连续薄膜状析出。
AI.conclusion: 界面原子结构（共格/非共格特性）是决定晶界析出相选择与形貌的关键因素，为设计高性能合金提供了界面工程的理论基础。

title: Symmetry-Breaking Induced Spin Transport and Magneto-Optical Regulation in 2D Altermagnet Ru2MoSe4
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) altermagnets (AMs) offer a compelling paradigm for advanced spintronics, yet their fully compensated macroscopic spin currents inherently limit practical device integration. In this work, using first-principles calculations and theoretical analysis, we demonstrate that the 2D material Ru2MoSe4 hosts AM ground state protected by S4zT symmetry. Using uniaxial strain modulation and stacking configuration, we show that the monolayer and the AC-stacking bilayer Ru2MoSe4 host fully spin-polarized currents, piezomagnetically induced net magnetization, and the magneto-optical Kerr effect. Our findings establish Ru2MoSe4 as a tunable platform, offering a feasible mechanism to simultaneously trigger electrical spin transport signals and amplify optical readout signatures for next-generation spintronics and valleytronics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算发现二维材料Ru2MoSe4具有交变磁（altermagnet）基态，并通过单轴应变和堆叠调控，实现了完全自旋极化的电流、压磁诱导净磁化和磁光克尔效应，为下一代自旋电子学和谷电子学提供了可调控平台。
AI.motivation: 二维交变磁体虽然为自旋电子学提供了新范式，但其完全补偿的宏观自旋电流本质上限制了实际器件集成，因此需要寻找能产生净自旋信号和可读光学响应的新型二维交变磁材料。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算和理论分析，研究了Ru2MoSe4单层及不同堆叠双层（AC堆叠）的电子结构；通过单轴应变调控和堆叠构型设计，分析了自旋极化电流、压磁效应和磁光克尔效应的产生机制。
AI.result: 发现Ru2MoSe4单层和AC堆叠双层具有完全自旋极化的电流、压磁诱导的净磁化强度以及显著的磁光克尔效应，实现了交变磁体中自旋和光学信号的同时增强。
AI.conclusion: Ru2MoSe4是一个可调控的二维交变磁平台，能够同时触发电学自旋输运信号和放大光学读出信号，有望应用于下一代自旋电子学和谷电子学器件。

title: Molecular dynamic simulation of multicomponent CoCrFeNiMn high-entropy alloy thin film deposition
comment: Accepted manuscript. 12 pages, 5 figures. Published in Molecular Crystals and Liquid Crystals 769(7-8) (2025), 762-772. DOI: 10.1080/15421406.2025.2504044
summary: The deposition and growth of a thin CoCrFeMnNi high-entropy alloy film on an Al(100) substrate were investigated by molecular dynamics simulation. Interatomic interactions were described using a calibrated set of Morse potentials combined with mixing rules for regular solutions. During a 100 ns simulation, 50,000 atoms with an incident energy of 10 eV were deposited, producing a film of about 6.1 nm thickness. The resulting film contains face-centred cubic (FCC), body-centred cubic (BCC), hexagonal close-packed (HCP), and amorphous regions. Analysis of the radial distribution function (RDF) was used to determine nearest-neighbour distances and estimate lattice parameters for the crystalline phases. The simulated phase composition and structural parameters are in good agreement with available experimental data.

AI.tldr: 通过分子动力学模拟研究了CoCrFeMnNi高熵合金薄膜在Al(100)基底上的沉积与生长，使用校准的Morse势和混合规则描述原子间相互作用。100 ns内沉积50,000个原子（能量10 eV），形成约6.1 nm厚薄膜，包含FCC、BCC、HCP和非晶区域。RDF分析确定了近邻距离和晶格参数，模拟结果与实验数据吻合良好。
AI.motivation: 探究CoCrFeMnNi高熵合金薄膜在Al基底上的沉积生长机制及微观结构演化，验证模拟方法与实验的一致性。
AI.method: 采用分子动力学模拟，使用校准的Morse势和规则溶液混合规则描述原子间相互作用；以10 eV能量在100 ns内沉积50,000个原子至Al(100)基底；通过RDF分析确定近邻距离和晶格参数。
AI.result: 形成约6.1 nm厚的薄膜，包含FCC、BCC、HCP和非晶相；RDF分析获得各相的近邻距离和晶格参数；模拟的相组成和结构参数与实验数据高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 该分子动力学模型能够准确预测CoCrFeMnNi高熵合金薄膜在Al基底上的沉积行为和微观结构，验证了所用势函数和模拟参数的有效性。

title: Layer-parity-defined surface polarization in Nb$_3$Cl$_8$ for excitonic modulation at van der Waals interfaces
summary: The intrinsic symmetry breaking in the breathing kagome lattice of layered Nb$_3$Cl$_8$ provides a unique mechanism for realizing electrically polar surfaces. In each monolayer, the trimerization of Nb atoms breaks inversion and mirror symmetries, generating an out-of-plane electric dipole. The AB-stacked $α$ phase arranges adjacent layer dipoles antiferroelectrically, leaving the uncompensated surface polarization strictly governed by layer parity. Here, using atomic force microscopy operated in Kelvin probe force microscopy mode, we directly visualize layer-dependent polarization states in exfoliated Nb$_3$Cl$_8$ flakes and resolve a pronounced odd-even oscillation of the surface electrostatic potential. Beyond this parity-locked antiferroelectric order, we further identify intralayer polar domains in which local atomic reconstructions of the breathing kagome network reverse the out-of-plane dipole of the surface layer, producing ferroelectric-like stacking configurations. By interfacing monolayer MoSe$_2$ with Nb$_3$Cl$_8$, we demonstrate that these surface-polarization textures effectively modulate adjacent excitonic emission through domain-dependent interfacial band alignment and charge transfer. Our findings establish Nb$_3$Cl$_8$ as an intrinsic layer-polarized van der Waals platform and show that layer parity provides powerful structural degree of freedom for programming excitonic and optoelectronic responses at van der Waals interfaces.

AI.tldr: 本文通过开尔文探针力显微镜直接观测了Nb₃Cl₈薄片中层依赖的极化状态，揭示了奇偶振荡的表面静电势、层内极化畴以及通过界面能带对齐调控MoSe₂激子发射的机制。
AI.motivation: 呼吸型kagome晶格Nb₃Cl₈具有固有的对称性破缺，可产生电极化表面，但其层依赖的极化状态及其对界面光电子特性的调控尚未被直接观测和利用。
AI.method: 使用原子力显微镜的开尔文探针力显微镜模式直接成像薄片表面静电势，并结合单层MoSe₂异质结研究界面效应。
AI.result: 观察到奇偶振荡的表面静电势；识别出层内极化畴（通过局部原子重构反转偶极）；MoSe₂激子发射受表面极化纹理调制。
AI.conclusion: Nb₃Cl₈是一种本征层极化范德华平台，层奇偶性可作为编程范德华界面激子与光电子响应的结构自由度。

title: Artificial Intelligence for Instability in Inorganic Perovskites: From Mechanism Discovery to Engineering Strategies
summary: Three-dimensional all-inorganic halide perovskites, represented by CsPbX$_3$ (X = Cl, Br, I), have attracted broad interest in photovoltaics, photodetectors, and light-emitting devices because of their outstanding optoelectronic properties. Their practical deployment, however, remains limited by instability under thermal, chemical, optical, and electrical stress. Conventional studies have established important experimental and theoretical foundations, but they still struggle with multimodal data, coupled degradation pathways, protocol dependence, sparse statistics, and uncertainty quantification. Artificial intelligence (AI) offers a practical route to address these limitations. This review summarizes recent progress in AI-assisted studies of instability in 3D CsPbX$_3$ and organizes the discussion around four linked tasks, including stability discrimination and diagnosis, microscopic mechanism analysis, consequence and reliability modeling, and engineering stability enhancement. We further discuss the main limitations of current methods, especially in data quality, protocol consistency, benchmark design, interpretability, and transferability across domains. Finally, we outline future directions for the field, including standardized data infrastructures, interpretable cross-scale models, and tighter integration of AI with automated experiments and physics-based modeling. The aim of this review is to provide a coherent and practically useful framework for researchers seeking to use AI to understand, predict, and mitigate instability in inorganic perovskites.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能在解决三维无机卤化物钙钛矿（CsPbX₃）不稳定性问题中的应用，围绕稳定性判别、微观机制分析、可靠性建模和工程增强四个任务展开，并指出了当前数据质量、协议一致性、可解释性等局限性及未来方向。
AI.motivation: CsPbX₃钙钛矿虽具有优异光电性能，但在热、化学、光、电应力下不稳定，传统方法难以处理多模态数据、耦合退化路径、稀疏统计和不确定性量化等问题，亟需AI方法介入。
AI.method: 综述了AI辅助研究CsPbX₃不稳定性的四类任务：稳定性判别与诊断、微观机制分析、后果与可靠性建模、工程稳定性增强，并评述了现有方法的局限性。
AI.result: 总结了AI在钙钛矿稳定性研究中的进展，指出了数据质量差、协议不一致、缺乏基准、可解释性弱和跨域迁移难等主要问题。
AI.conclusion: 未来需要构建标准化数据基础设施、发展可解释的跨尺度模型，并加强AI与自动化实验及物理建模的融合。

title: BSE+ calculations for 2D materials: a unified description of excitons and plasmons
summary: The Bethe-Salpeter equation (BSE) accurately describes low-energy optical spectra in materials with strong excitonic effects, but its high computational cost limits the number of electron-hole transitions that can be included. Neglecting high-energy transitions leads to an underestimation of the real part of the dielectric function, often producing a spurious plasmon peak in the BSE electron energy loss spectrum (EELS). The recently introduced BSE+ method addresses this by combining a four-point BSE-like equation for the irreducible polarisability with a two-point Dyson equation that includes the high-energy transitions at the Random Phase Approximation (RPA) level. Here, we present a detailed account of the method, extend it to two-dimensional materials, and apply it to a set of transition metal dichalcogenide monolayers. BSE+ preserves the excitonic features of the BSE at low energies while reproducing the plasmonic structure of the RPA at higher energies, yielding good agreement with experimental EELS data across the full energy range and strongly suppressing the spurious plasmon. BSE+ converges much faster than BSE with respect to the electron-hole basis size, at a comparable computational cost, and is implemented in the GPAW code.

AI.tldr: BSE+方法通过结合四点BSE方程和两点Dyson方程，在保持低能激子特性的同时准确描述高能等离激元结构，显著抑制了虚假等离激元峰，计算效率优于传统BSE方法。
AI.motivation: 传统BSE方法计算成本高，忽略高能电子-空穴跃迁会导致介电函数实部低估，在EELS谱中产生虚假等离激元峰。
AI.method: 将四点BSE类方程（用于不可极化率）与两点Dyson方程（在高能区以RPA水平包含跃迁）相结合，形成BSE+方法，并扩展到二维材料体系。
AI.result: BSE+在低能区保留BSE的激子特征，高能区再现RPA的等离激元结构，与实验EELS数据在全能量范围内吻合良好，有效抑制了虚假等离激元峰。收敛速度远快于BSE，计算成本相当。
AI.conclusion: BSE+是一种高效准确的方法，已在GPAW代码中实现，适用于二维过渡金属硫族化合物等材料的光学性质计算。

title: Metal Halide Perovskite/Chalcohalide Heterojunctions for the Photoinduced Oxidative Coupling of p-substituted Thiophenols
summary: The introduction of a semiconductor-semiconductor junction is an effective strategy to enhance the photocatalytic performance of perovskite nanocrystal-based systems. Herein, we optimized the synthesis of CsPbX3/Pb4S3X2 (X= Cl, Br, I) perovskites-chalcohalides heterostructures, whose band alignment can be tuned by halide composition. As a proof-of-concept, we evaluated the photooxidative coupling of p-substituted thiophenols at room temperature, under visible-light, air, and without sacrificial electron donor. Notably, CsPbBr3/Pb4S3Br2 achieved up to 94 % selectivity toward disulfide (p-OCH3 thiophenol with a turnover number of 14300) highlighting the crucial role of the type-II heterojunction to promote charge separation and efficient electron delocalization across the junction.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种可调谐的CsPbX3/Pb4S3X2钙钛矿-硫卤化物异质结构，通过II型异质结实现高效电荷分离，在可见光下无需牺牲电子供体即可实现p-取代苯硫酚的高选择性光氧化偶联（CsPbBr3/Pb4S3Br2选择性达94%，TON达14300）。
AI.motivation: 引入半导体-半导体结是提升钙钛矿纳米晶光催化性能的有效策略，本文旨在通过优化合成可调谐带对齐的CsPbX3/Pb4S3X2异质结构，实现高效光催化。
AI.method: 合成CsPbX3/Pb4S3X2 (X=Cl, Br, I) 钙钛矿-硫卤化物异质结构，通过卤素组成调控能带对齐；以p-取代苯硫酚的光氧化偶联为探针反应，在室温、可见光、空气条件下评价催化性能。
AI.result: CsPbBr3/Pb4S3Br2对p-OCH3苯硫酚的光氧化偶联选择性达94%，周转数(TON)为14300，II型异质结促进了电荷分离和电子离域。
AI.conclusion: II型异质结在促进电荷分离和电子高效离域中起关键作用，所设计的异质结构在无牺牲电子供体条件下展现出优异的光催化氧化性能。

title: The impact of interfacial chemistry on the band offset of GaAs/Ga$_2$O$_3$ heterostructures
summary: Ga$_2$O$_3$/GaAs heterojunctions are emerging as promising candidates for next-generation power electronics, photonics, and energy devices, leveraging the high breakdown voltage and thermal stability of Ga$_2$O$_3$ alongside the mature technology, high hole mobility, and higher refractive index of GaAs. The efficiency of these devices depends strongly on the band alignment between the two materials, however both type-I and type-II alignment have been reported in the literature for these heterostructures. To address this ambiguity, we use hybrid density functional theory to systematically investigate the band alignment at GaAs/Ga$_2$O$_3$ interfaces, focusing on the role of interface chemistry. By considering Ga-O-, As-, and As-O-rich interfaces both in amorphous and crystalline Ga$_2$O$_3$ phases, we demonstrate that interface stoichiometry determines the alignment type: Ga-O-rich interfaces exhibit type-II alignment with large valence band offsets (~3.1 eV), while As-rich and As-O-rich interfaces favor type-I alignment with reduced offsets (~2.3-2.6 eV). These trends are attributed to interface dipole formation driven by bonding configuration. Our findings provide insight into the relationship between chemistry and band alignment in GaAs/Ga$_2$O$_3$ heterostructures, enabling targeted optimization for specific device applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过杂化密度泛函理论系统研究了GaAs/Ga₂O₃异质结的能带对齐，发现界面化学计量决定对齐类型：Ga-O富集界面呈Type-II对齐（价带偏移~3.1 eV），而As富集和As-O富集界面呈Type-I对齐（偏移~2.3-2.6 eV），为器件优化提供了指导。
AI.motivation: Ga₂O₃/GaAs异质结在功率电子、光子学和能源器件中潜力巨大，但文献中对其能带对齐类型（Type-I vs Type-II）存在矛盾报道，亟需系统厘清。
AI.method: 采用杂化密度泛函理论（hybrid DFT）进行第一性原理计算，系统考察不同界面化学计量（Ga-O富集、As富集、As-O富集）以及非晶和多晶Ga₂O₃相下的能带对齐情况。
AI.result: Ga-O富集界面为Type-II对齐，价带偏移约3.1 eV；As富集和As-O富集界面为Type-I对齐，偏移约2.3-2.6 eV；界面偶极子由键合构型决定，驱动了能带对齐类型的变化。
AI.conclusion: 界面化学计量是决定GaAs/Ga₂O₃异质结能带对齐的关键因素，该发现为针对特定器件应用（如功率电子或光电器件）进行界面工程优化提供了理论依据。

title: The group theory of Raman effect in magnetic materials
summary: Although Raman scattering in magnetic materials exhibits rich experimental phenomena, the symmetry constraints on Raman tensors have not been fully elucidated. In this work, we use Onsager reciprocity relation, other than the conventional corepresentation method, to deal with the mathematical structures of Raman tensors in magnetic groups. Using this approach, we generate Raman tensor tables for all magnetic point groups, and present a comprehensive understanding of the Raman selection rules in magnetic materials with direct product representations method. Our theoretical and numerical results match previous experiments well, and resolve a puzzle in the Raman spectroscopy of CrSBr. Moreover, we identify a common but overlooked phenomenon: the magneto-Raman vector can be orthogonal to the magnetic moment direction. Our method and associated Raman tensor tables will be helpful for the Raman studies in both experimental and theoretical domains.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Onsager互易关系而非传统的共表示方法，推导了所有磁性点群的拉曼张量表，并解释了CrSBr拉曼光谱中的谜题，同时发现了磁拉曼矢量与磁矩方向正交的普遍现象。
AI.motivation: 磁性材料中的拉曼散射实验现象丰富，但拉曼张量的对称性约束尚未被充分阐明，传统方法存在局限。
AI.method: 采用Onsager互易关系处理磁群中拉曼张量的数学结构，结合直积表示方法生成所有磁点群的拉曼张量表。
AI.result: 成功匹配以往实验，解决了CrSBr拉曼光谱的疑难问题，并发现磁拉曼矢量与磁矩方向正交这一被忽视的普遍现象。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法和拉曼张量表将对实验和理论领域的拉曼研究具有重要参考价值。

title: Hydride formation and phase separation in palladium nanoparticles from a transferable atomic cluster expansion potential
summary: The palladium-hydrogen system is a prototype for hydrogen-metal interactions and underpins technologies such as hydrogen storage, catalysis and purification. Yet its nanoscale behaviour -- where surface and interface energetics, elastic coherency strain and size-dependent thermodynamics govern phase separation -- has eluded accurate atomistic simulation. Empirical potentials misrepresent the energetics of interstitial hydrogen, while existing machine-learning models are restricted to bulk phases at low-hydrogen environments. Here we introduce an atomic cluster expansion (ACE) for Pd-H that reproduces formation energies, phonon spectra, elastic constants, hydrogen migration barriers and surface adsorption with near-DFT accuracy, benchmarked directly against neutron-scattering, high-pressure and lattice-expansion experiments. Its near-linear scaling and CPU efficiency make molecular dynamics of PdH$_x$ nanoparticles exceeding 28,000 atoms ($\sim$12 nm in diameter) tractable over nanosecond timescales. These simulations resolve, at the atomic scale, the kinetic separation of $α$- and $β$-PdH$_x$ into a core-shell architecture, reproduce the experimentally observed size dependence of the lattice parameter, and uncover a pronounced hydrogen-induced lowering of the nanoparticle melting temperature. The potential brings experimentally relevant scales of metal-hydride dynamics within quantitative reach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于Pd-H体系的原子团簇展开(ACE)势，具有近DFT精度，能够模拟超过28,000个原子的PdH_x纳米颗粒，揭示了核壳结构的相分离、尺寸依赖晶格参数以及氢诱导的熔化温度降低等纳米尺度行为。
AI.motivation: 钯-氢体系是理解氢-金属相互作用的关键原型，但纳米尺度下的相分离行为因表面/界面能量学、弹性应变和尺寸热力学效应而难以通过传统经验势或现有机器学习模型精确模拟。
AI.method: 开发了一种原子团簇展开(ACE)势，在近DFT精度下复现了形成能、声子谱、弹性常数、氢迁移势垒和表面吸附等性质，并实现了近线性计算扩展效率。
AI.result: 成功模拟了超过28,000个原子的PdH_x纳米颗粒（~12 nm），揭示了α和β相的核壳分离动力学，复现了晶格参数的尺寸依赖性，并发现了氢诱导的纳米颗粒熔化温度显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 该ACE势使金属-氢化物动力学模拟达到实验相关尺度，为纳米尺度氢-金属相互作用研究提供了定量工具。

title: Context-Aware Deep Learning for Defect Classification in Atomic-Resolution STEM
summary: Artificial intelligence is rapidly advancing materials characterization, yet most applications in electron microscopy rely solely on image contrast, overlooking the chemical and experimental context that shapes image formation. This limitation makes defect classification inherently ambiguous, as similar contrasts can arise from different materials or imaging conditions. Here we develop a context-aware learning framework that integrates image-derived contrast with metadata describing composition, beam energy, and detector geometry. Using a systematically constructed dataset of ~55 million simulated patches spanning 576 cases across 96 doped monolayer transition-metal dichalcogenides, we show that conditioning on contextual variables transforms defect classification from an ill-posed image-only task into a well-posed, physically grounded problem. The framework achieves over 98% accuracy on simulations and near-human agreement on experimental data, with a 94% reduction in posterior entropy. By emphasizing contextual grounding over architectural complexity, this approach links experimental image contrast to the underlying chemical and imaging conditions, supporting physically grounded defect assignments and a general pathway toward multimodal AI models for autonomous materials characterization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种上下文感知的学习框架，通过融合图像对比度与实验元数据（成分、束能量、探测器几何），将缺陷分类从仅依赖图像的病态问题转化为物理上有据可依的良态问题，在~5500万模拟图像斑块上实现98%+准确率，并将后验熵降低94%。
AI.motivation: 传统电子显微镜中的缺陷分类仅依赖图像对比度，忽略了化学组成和实验条件等关键上下文信息，导致分类具有内在歧义性——相似的图像对比度可能源自不同的材料或成像条件。
AI.method: 构建了一个上下文感知学习框架，将图像对比度与元数据（成分、束能量、探测器几何）进行多模态融合；系统构建了包含~5500万模拟斑块的数据集，覆盖96种掺杂单层过渡金属二硫属化物中的576种情况。
AI.result: 模拟数据上分类准确率超过98%，实验数据上达到接近人类专家水平的一致性，后验熵降低94%。
AI.conclusion: 上下文信息（化学与实验条件）的引入是解决成像歧义性的关键，该方法为自主材料表征中的多模态AI模型提供了通用路径，强调了上下文基础而非架构复杂性。

title: A Robust Agentic Framework for Expert-Level Automation of Atomistic Simulations
summary: Traditionally, atomistic simulation has been constrained by the computational scaling limits of ab initio methods and the parameterization overhead of empirical force fields. The recent emergence of universal machine learning interatomic potentials has significantly mitigated these bottlenecks, offering near-quantum accuracy and generalizability across diverse chemical spaces at a fraction of the computational cost. However, this shift has relocated the bottleneck to the human dimension: time-consuming mechanical processes, such as input preparation and data analysis, now dominate the research lifecycle. We introduce Paimon, a Platform for Agentic Integration in Materials Optimization and Nanoscale-simulations. Through hundreds of trials on an expert-level liquid electrolyte simulation, we show that Paimon substantially improves the reliability of agentic workflows by suppressing silent errors: plausible yet physically incorrect results. We further demonstrate that Paimon can cooperate with an external scientific agent and autonomously reproduce simulation methodologies from the literature. As an agent harness for atomistic simulations, Paimon affords researchers a continuous, science-centric workflow throughout the entire simulation lifecycle.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Paimon，一个用于原子模拟的智能体集成平台，通过自动化输入准备和数据分析等机械性任务，显著提升了工作流的可靠性并抑制了静默错误，支持与外部科学智能体协作及文献方法复现。
AI.motivation: 传统原子模拟受限于从头算方法的计算扩展极限和经验力场的参数化开销。通用机器学习原子间势虽缓解了计算瓶颈，但将瓶颈转移到人力层面：输入准备和数据分析等耗时机械过程现在主导了研究周期。
AI.method: 提出了Paimon——一个面向材料优化和纳米模拟的智能体集成平台。通过数百次专家级液态电解质模拟实验，验证平台性能。
AI.result: Paimon显著提升了智能体工作流的可靠性，有效抑制了静默错误（看似合理但物理上不正确的结果）。此外，Paimon能与外部科学智能体协作，并自主复现文献中的模拟方法。
AI.conclusion: Paimon作为原子模拟的智能体工具集，为研究人员在整个模拟生命周期中提供了持续、以科学为中心的工作流。

title: \textit{\textbf{First-principles}} description of pumped inelastic X-ray scattering: example of K-edge RIXS in graphite
summary: We present an \textit{ab initio} framework for predicting resonant inelastic X-ray scattering (RIXS) in optically pumped materials. Our methodology is based on the Kramers-Heisenberg formula for the double-differential cross section formulated using the results of the Bethe-Salpeter equation (BSE) from many-body perturbation theory. To extend this approach to the time domain, we incorporate non-equilibrium charge-carrier distributions obtained from real-time, time-dependent density-functional theory (RT-TDDFT). Generalizing the RIXS implementation with respect to arbitrary polarizations, allows us to consider different orientations of incoming and outgoing light. We demonstrate our method's capabilities by studying RIXS at the K-edge of graphite for various non-equilibrium charge-carrier distributions, representing different delay times after optical pumping. Our results reveal angular dependencies in $π$- and $σ$-orbital-derived spectral regions, in good agreement with experiment.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于BSE和RT-TDDFT的ab initio框架，用于预测光学泵浦材料中的共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS），在石墨K-edge上验证了与实验吻合的角依赖性。
AI.motivation: 现有RIXS计算方法主要针对平衡态材料，缺乏对光学泵浦后非平衡态下RIXS的理论预测能力。
AI.method: 基于Kramers-Heisenberg公式与BSE求解双微分截面，结合RT-TDDFT获取非平衡载流子分布，并推广到任意极化方向。
AI.result: 在石墨K-edge的RIXS计算中，成功复现了π和σ轨道谱区的角度依赖性，与实验符合良好。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可有效预测非平衡态材料的RIXS信号，为超快X射线散射实验提供理论支持。

title: Controlled component segregation in vapor-deposited organic semiconductor glass mixtures
summary: Multicomponent vapor-deposited organic glasses are essential in organic electronic applications, but achieving controlled component segregation at the nano- and mesoscale remains a challenge, hindering the rational development of high-performance devices. In this study, we investigate binary organic semiconductor mixtures of TPD (N,N'-Bis(3-methylphenyl)-N,N'-diphenylbenzidine) and TCTA (Tris(4-carbazoyl-9-ylphenyl)amine). Despite being miscible in the bulk liquid state, the co-deposited glassy films of these two organic semiconductors exhibit a range of segregation behaviors, from homogenous to clearly phase-separated structures. We employed differential scanning calorimetry and resonant soft X-ray scattering (RSoXS) to study the component segregation behavior and used the National Institute of Standards and Technology RSoXS Simulation Suite, paired with Atomic Force Microscopy, to interpret the energy-dependent RSoXS spectra. Our results indicate that component segregation in co-deposited TPD-TCTA films is due to a kinetically-arrested nucleation-and-growth mechanism, in contrast to the segregation mechanism of a previously reported TPD-DO37 (disperse orange 37) mixture which is strongly immiscible in bulk. This work provides a demonstration of tunable molecular aggregation in organic semiconductor glasses, enabling access to a continuum of morphologies from homogeneously mixed to segregated phases.

AI.tldr: 本文研究共沉积TPD-TCTA二元有机半导体玻璃薄膜中的组分分离行为，发现其遵循动力学抑制的成核与生长机制，可在均匀混合到相分离之间实现连续可调的形貌调控。
AI.motivation: 多元气相沉积有机玻璃在有机电子器件中至关重要，但在纳米和介观尺度实现可控组分分离仍是挑战，阻碍了高性能器件的理性开发。
AI.method: 采用差示扫描量热法(DSC)和共振软X射线散射(RSoXS)研究组分分离行为，配合原子力显微镜(AFM)以及NIST RSoXS模拟套件解释能量依赖的RSoXS光谱。
AI.result: TPD-TCTA共沉积薄膜中的组分分离源于动力学抑制的成核与生长机制，与之前报道的体相强不混溶的TPD-DO37混合物分离机制不同，实现了从均匀混合到相分离的连续形貌可调性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究展示了有机半导体玻璃中可调谐的分子聚集行为，实现了从均匀混合到相分离连续形貌谱的可控获取，为有机电子器件性能优化提供了新路径。

title: Predicting Physical and Physical-Chemical Properties of Molecular-Based Materials Using Computational Neural Networks
summary: A computational scheme, which utilizes neural networks, was developed to predict properties of molecular-based materials from chemical structures. The method uses a set of simple algorithms to encode the structure and composition of organic molecules directly into numerical vectors, which is used as input for neural networks. Backpropagation type neural networks are then used to correlate these numeric inputs with a set of desired properties. Calculated results for a series of hydrocarbons, hydrofluorocarbons, and crown ethers demonstrate average accuracies of 0.2-8.1% with maximum deviations of 16-20% for a broad range of thermodynamic, physical, and physical-chemical characteristics (heat capacity, enthalpy, heat of evaporation, boiling point, density, refractive index, stability constants, etc.). In addition, a number of physical and mechanical properties were estimated for polymeric materials and compared with regression analysis. Based on the neural network capabilities of formulating accurate quantitative structure property relationships, a technique called computational synthesis is suggested for performing materials design.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一种基于神经网络的分子材料性质预测方法，将分子结构编码为数值向量，通过反向传播神经网络建立结构-性质关系，在多种材料体系上取得了良好预测精度，并提出了计算合成技术用于材料设计。
AI.motivation: 传统的分子材料性质预测依赖实验测量或复杂的理论计算，效率低、成本高。研究者希望通过神经网络建立定量结构-性质关系（QSPR），实现从化学结构直接预测材料性质，加快材料设计进程。
AI.method: 设计简单算法将有机分子的结构和组成直接编码为数值向量作为神经网络输入，采用反向传播神经网络训练模型，将数值输入与目标性质进行关联映射。
AI.result: 在碳氢化合物、氢氟碳化合物和冠醚等系列材料上，对热力学、物理、物理化学性质（热容、焓、汽化热、沸点、密度、折射率、稳定常数等）的预测平均精度为0.2-8.1%，最大偏差为16-20%。同时对聚合物材料的物理力学性能进行了估计，并对比了回归分析结果。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络具备建立准确定量结构-性质关系的能力，基于此提出的"计算合成"技术可用于指导材料设计。

title: Stoichiometric Epitaxial Strontium Titanate Thin Films on Silicon by High-Temperature Sr Segregation
summary: Thin-film strontium titanate (SrTiO$_3$, STO) layers grown on silicon require accurate stoichiometry and single-crystalline order to exploit their functional properties optimally. Oxide molecular beam epitaxy can provide an epitaxial interface, but suffers from source oxidation and resulting flux instabilities, yielding only a narrow growth process window for cationic stoichiometry control. Here, we investigate post-growth annealing in oxygen as a pathway to drive the STO layer toward stoichiometry in intentionally Sr-rich epitaxial STO films on silicon (001). Annealing over a broad temperature range revealed two distinct Sr-segregation mechanisms. Below 800 °C, excess Sr segregates toward the surface, forming SrO outgrowths that progressively sublimate at elevated temperatures. Above 800 °C, a second mechanism dominates: Sr accumulates within the interfacial SiO$_2$ layer formed by oxygen diffusion at the STO/Si interface. Together, these mechanisms effectively remove excess Sr from the STO lattice, yielding a more stoichiometric perovskite layer. Our results demonstrate that growing slightly Sr-rich STO templates followed by controlled annealing provides a practical route to improve crystalline quality, offering a scalable strategy for high-quality STO integration on silicon.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了利用后退火工艺将故意富锶的钛酸锶（STO）薄膜转化为化学计量比薄膜的两种锶偏析机制，从而提升STO/Si(001)的晶体质量。
AI.motivation: 氧化物分子束外延技术虽能实现STO在硅上的外延界面，但存在源氧化和通量不稳定等问题，导致化学计量比控制窗口窄，难以获得高质量单晶薄膜。
AI.method: 在富锶的STO/Si(001)薄膜上进行宽温度范围的氧气后退火处理，研究锶的偏析与去除行为。
AI.result: 发现两种锶偏析机制：低温（<800°C）时，过量锶向表面偏析形成SrO析出物；高温（>800°C）时，锶在STO/Si界面的SiO₂层中富集。两种机制共同作用可有效去除过量锶。
AI.conclusion: 生长轻微富锶的STO模板并进行可控后退火，是改善STO薄膜晶体质量、实现高质量STO在硅上集成的实用且可扩展的策略。

title: k-Means Clustering in Fingerprint-Based Configuration Selection for Fitting Interatomic Potentials
summary: In this study, we present a method for selecting an arbitrary number of distinct configurations from a larger data set by applying k-means clustering to atomistic configuration fingerprints based on the CrystalNN model and radial distribution function (RDF). This approach improves the accuracy of fitting classical molecular dynamics interatomic potentials to density functional theory (DFT) data for both energies and forces while requiring fewer configurations than random selection. We demonstrate this improvement by fitting an embedded-atom method (EAM) potential for titanium, using various configurational sizes from an initial set of 1800 configurations. The k-means clustering consistently achieves better precision and lower standard deviations for a smaller number of configurations than random selection. The results also suggest that only about 30 configurations are sufficient to obtain an EAM model that describes well the full set of 1800 configurations in terms of energies and forces. Additionally, t-distributed stochastic neighbor embedding (t-SNE) method was used to reduce the configuration fingerprints into 2D space, and it revealed an overlap between two configuration subsets with and without Ti vacancy, indicating similar atomic environments. This similarity is captured by k-means clustering but not by random selection. Furthermore, when the overlapping configurations with vacancies were excluded from the k-means algorithm and used only as a test set, their energy and force predictions showed similar precision to those when they were included. This indicates that the overlapping configurations in the 2D t-SNE space indeed imply potential information redundancy among the atomistic configurations.

AI.tldr: 提出基于k-means聚类和CrystalNN/RDF原子指纹的方法，从DFT数据中高效选择原子构型来拟合经典分子动力学势函数，显著优于随机选择，仅需约30个构型即可获得良好EAM势函数。
AI.motivation: 传统随机选择构型拟合经典分子动力学势函数效率低、精度差，需要大量DFT构型数据。作者希望提出一种更智能的构型选择方法，在减少计算成本的同时提高势函数拟合精度。
AI.method: 1. 使用CrystalNN模型和径向分布函数(RDF)生成原子构型指纹；2. 对指纹进行k-means聚类，从每类中选取代表性构型；3. 用选中的构型拟合EAM势函数（以钛为例）；4. 使用t-SNE将指纹降至2D可视化，分析构型冗余性。
AI.result: k-means聚类选择在精度和标准差上一致优于随机选择；约30个构型即可很好描述1800个构型的能量和力；t-SNE显示含钛空位构型与无空位构型存在重叠，k-means聚类能捕捉到这种相似性，排除重叠构型后预测精度几乎不变，验证了信息冗余。
AI.conclusion: 基于k-means聚类的原子构型选择方法能有效减少冗余、提升势函数拟合效率与精度，是随机选择的更优替代方案。

title: Lattice genome: representation and analysis of heterogeneous crystalline microstructures
summary: Inspired by the concept of a generalized materials genome, we introduce the notions of lattice gene and lattice genome for crystalline materials. A lattice gene is a compact representation of the local crystalline structure obtained by encoding the Kikuchi diffraction patterns with a variational autoencoder. We show that this representation satisfies key criteria for a materials gene: compactness, experimental accessibility, existence of a distance metric reflecting structural similarity, and sufficient information content for reconstructing the original diffraction patterns. The lattice genome is the spatially resolved collection of lattice genes across a representative area mapped by electron backscatter diffraction (EBSD), which captures mesoscale heterogeneity that ultimately controls properties. We demonstrate three applications of the lattice genome: (i) latent component maps that visualize grain-scale and intra-grain heterogeneities, (ii) domain segmentation based on distance and angle metrics in the latent space, and (iii) kernel and domain latent vector spreads that quantify intragranular heterogeneity as high-dimensional analogs of kernel average misorientation and grain orientation spread. All three tools are validated on microstructures of additively manufactured and wrought Ni-base superalloys in as-built and recrystallized conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文受广义材料基因组概念启发，提出了晶体材料的"晶格基因"和"晶格基因组"概念。晶格基因是通过变分自编码器编码菊池衍射图案得到的局部晶体结构紧凑表示；晶格基因组是通过EBSD映射的代表性区域的空间分辨晶格基因集合。研究展示了三个应用：潜在成分图、基于潜在空间距离的域分割、以及量化晶粒内异质性的潜在向量扩散度量。
AI.motivation: 现有材料基因组方法缺乏实验可获取、紧凑且能反映结构相似性的局部晶体结构表示，难以捕捉介观尺度的异质性，而该异质性最终控制材料性能。
AI.method: 使用变分自编码器(VAE)对Kikuchi衍射图案进行编码，得到低维潜在空间中的"晶格基因"向量；通过EBSD技术获取空间分辨的晶格基因集合，构建"晶格基因组"。
AI.result: 在增材制造和锻造镍基高温合金的微观结构上验证了三种应用：潜在成分图可可视化晶粒尺度及晶粒内异质性；基于潜在空间距离和角度的域分割可实现结构域划分；核和域潜在向量扩散可量化晶粒内异质性，作为KAM和GOS的高维类比。
AI.conclusion: 该晶格基因表示满足材料基因的关键标准：紧凑性、实验可获取性、存在反映结构相似性的距离度量、以及足够的信息内容用于重构原始衍射图案。
